title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 379.1379 - Swap agreements permitted
text:
379.1379.  Swap agreements permitted. — The SPLRC may enter into swap agreements for any purpose for which a Missouri domestic life insurer could enter into such a transaction under section 375.345 or when the underlying interests are permitted investments if held directly by the SPLRC.
(L. 2007 S.B. 215)
